task_completion.description: Verify that the T4 employment income has been entered for Julian Blackwood.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax T4 slip entry screen showing the taxpayer name 'Julian Blackwood' with an employment income amount of $215,000.

task_completion.description: Verify that the T101 Statement of Resource Expenses has been entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax T101 slip entry screen showing a Canadian Exploration Expense (CEE) of $30,000.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Canadian Exploration Expense deduction is claimed on Form T1229.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax Form T1229 visible on screen showing the $30,000 CEE deduction applied.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Critical Mineral Exploration Tax Credit is claimed on Form T2038(IND).
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax Form T2038(IND) visible on screen showing a Federal Investment Tax Credit of $9,000.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Ontario Flow-Through Share Tax Credit is claimed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax provincial tax forms (e.g., ON479 or specific Ontario ITC form) showing a Provincial Investment Tax Credit of $1,500.

task_completion.description: Verify that the investment loan interest is entered as a carrying charge on Schedule 4.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax Schedule 4 showing carrying charges or interest expenses of $1,450.

task_completion.description: Verify that the completed tax return is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax title bar showing 'julian_blackwood.24t' or a save dialog/file explorer confirming the file was saved as 'julian_blackwood.24t'.

integrity.description: The agent must use the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to complete the tax return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual StudioTax 2024 application window being interacted with, not a terminal or text editor modifying the .24t file directly.

integrity.description: The agent must manually enter the data into the tax forms rather than using a script to inject values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through StudioTax menus, forms, or slip entry screens, with active cursors or highlighted fields.

integrity.description: The file must be saved using StudioTax's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of the 'Save As' dialog from StudioTax or the StudioTax window title updating to the expected filename.
